THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEZIS, JASON A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION (A.K. A.
